title: nageia latifolia
intro: Nageia latifolia, also known as the Borneo umbrella tree, is a species of coniferous tree in the family Podocarpaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Nageia latifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help reduce inflammation and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the bark, leaves, and resin of the tree are often used to create teas, infusions, and ointments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
